## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CLI behavior update
- [ ] Repo tooling / CI update

## Verification

Commands run:

```bash
pnpm ci:oss
```

Additional checks (if relevant):

```bash
# example
node packages/cli/dist/index.js verify --help
```

## Risk and rollback

- Risk level: low / medium / high
- Rollback plan:

## Checklist

- [ ] I read `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] I did not commit secrets or local artifacts
- [ ] I updated docs for user-visible changes
- [ ] CI passes
